summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P3 features (Voice Assistant + Multi-language) and regression on P0-P2 features. All 19 backend tests passed. All 18 frontend tests passed. Voice Assistant works with GPT-5.2 integration. Language selector shows 4 languages and persists to localStorage. StockTrading page shows correct dollar amounts (no $NaN). Compliance Dashboard shows 'Live from MongoDB' badge with metrics from DB.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice Assistant uses real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key - working correctly
Buffett Ideas stock data is MOCKED (static in StockTrading.jsx)
Backtest and Valuations tabs have static data
News tab correctly fetches live data from /api/news/headlines
Compliance Dashboard correctly fetches data from MongoDB via /api/compliance-docs/dashboard
Language selector correctly persists to localStorage key 'halcyon_language'
seed_data_creation: Compliance docs seeded via POST /api/compliance-docs/seed-demo (5 documents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P3 features working: Voice Assistant at bottom-right FAB opens panel with mic, text input, send button, and disclaimer. GPT-5.2 responds to financial questions. Language selector in sidebar bottom shows 4 languages (English, Mandarin, Vietnamese, Greek) and persists to localStorage. StockTrading page at /stock-trading has 5 tabs with correct dollar amounts. Compliance Dashboard at /adviser-compliance shows 'Live from MongoDB' badge. Navigation sidebar does NOT show 'Buffett Engine' as separate item.

voice_assistant_fab.details: Microphone FAB button at bottom-right opens voice assistant panel

voice_assistant_panel.details: Panel has mic button, text input, send button, and disclaimer

voice_assistant_chat.details: Text chat works - GPT-5.2 responds to financial questions

language_selector.details: Visible in sidebar bottom, shows 4 languages (English, Mandarin, Vietnamese, Greek)

language_persistence.details: Changing language persists in localStorage key 'halcyon_language'

stock_trading_portfolio.details: Portfolio tab shows correct dollar amounts ($135,210.00 Portfolio Value, no $NaN)

stock_trading_news.details: News tab shows 20 live headlines from /api/news/headlines with source and time

stock_trading_buffett.details: Buffett Ideas tab shows value opportunities (FMG.AX, NAB.AX, CSL.AX, WES.AX) and sentiment (68 - Moderately Bullish)

compliance_dashboard.details: Shows 'Live from MongoDB' badge and metrics (Total: 5, Compliant: 2, Minor: 1, Major: 1, Pending: 1, Avg Score: 79%)

market_data_api.details: Returns 17 indicators including ASX 200, S&P 500, currencies, commodities

compliance_api.details: Returns metrics and advice files from MongoDB

navigation_no_buffett_engine.details: No 'Buffett Engine' standalone item in sidebar - correctly merged into Shares & ETFs

personal_dashboard.details: Loads with David & Sarah Thompson profile and live market data

mocked_apis_list: Buffett Ideas stock data (static in StockTrading.jsx)
mocked_apis.notes: Voice Assistant uses real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key. News tab and Compliance Dashboard use live backend APIs. Market data uses Yahoo Finance with 5-minute caching.
